user.title: TruLight BLE Controller
user.description:
Connect to a TruLight controller via its ESPHome BLE proxy.

You need an ESP32 running the TruLight BLE proxy firmware.

data_description.name: A friendly name (e.g., Backyard, Front Yard)
data_description.command_entity: The ESPHome text entity that accepts hex commands
data_description.power_on_entity: The ESPHome button that turns the controller on
data_description.power_off_entity: The ESPHome button that turns the controller off

zones.title: Zone Configuration
zones.description:
Name your lighting zones to create separate light entities for each. Leave blank to skip.

Each zone can be controlled independently with its own color, effect, and brightness.

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Make sure the ESPHome device is online.

abort.already_configured: This TruLight controller is already configured.
